generated_oml:
instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment of the vehicle physical twin"
    base:contains VehicleWheel, VehicleChassis, VehicleStructuralElements, WheelSpeedSensor, ChassisVibrationSensor, StructuralLoadSensor
]

instance VehicleWheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vehicle wheel component"
]

instance VehicleChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vehicle chassis component"
]

instance VehicleStructuralElements : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural elements of the vehicle"
]

instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring rotational speed of vehicle wheels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ChassisVibrationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring chassis vibrations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ChassisVibrationDataTransmitted
]

instance StructuralLoadSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring structural loads on vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData StructuralLoadDataTransmitted
]

instance WheelSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance ChassisVibrationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChassisVibrationSensor
]

instance StructuralLoadDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StructuralLoadSensor
]

instance WheelSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw wheel speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimator, CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance ChassisVibrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw chassis vibration measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ChassisVibrationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector, StateEstimator
]

instance StructuralLoadData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw structural load measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData StructuralLoadDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric model of vehicle structural dimensions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, StateEstimator
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations modeling dynamic behavior of vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance CyberPhysicalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Integrated model combining geometric and analytical aspects for cyber-physical simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for updating model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, OptimizationService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating vehicle state using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictionService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults in vehicle components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing vehicle performance parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService, ControlService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for assessing safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OptimalityViolationInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating PT behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides BehaviorPredictionInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for efficiency improvements"
    DTDFVocab:provides EfficiencyImprovementInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for supervisory control actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violation in vehicle operation"
]

instance OptimalityViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected optimality violation in vehicle performance"
]

instance BehaviorPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted behavior of PT under current operating conditions"
]

instance EfficiencyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for improving operational efficiency"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to modify physical twin based on violation detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs calibration algorithms to update the models of the cyber-physical system and environment with the best parameter estimates, uses the resulting data to inform monitoring systems for safety and optimal performance checks, and triggers human or algorithmic interventions for physical twin adjustments upon violation detection."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms adjust model parameters based on sensor data; monitoring systems validate system safety and optimality; fault detectors and supervisory controllers are employed for error detection and correction."
]
